description: Demo-approved substitution options. These are portfolio-demo rules, not clinical policy.

Oxygen Mask.notes: Use only for lower-acuity oxygen support scenarios; not equivalent for all respiratory needs.

Nasal Cannula.notes: May be acceptable when higher-flow oxygen delivery is appropriate.

Nitrile Gloves Medium.notes: Acceptable short-term PPE substitution if fit is adequate for staff.

Nitrile Gloves Large.notes: Acceptable only where fit is safe for the user.

PPE Gown.notes: Not a true replacement; included to show rejection behavior.

IV Start Kit.notes: Only solves part of the kit shortage. Requires manual kit build.
Only a component; not a full IV start kit replacement.

Syringe 10ml.notes: Could break kits only as last resort.

Sterile Gauze.notes: Wound care pack may contain gauze or acceptable dressing material.

Wound Care Pack.notes: Only supports simple dressing needs; not a full pack replacement.

Blood Draw Kit.notes: May support collection workflow only with additional supplies.

Surgical Tray.notes: Not a true surgical-tray replacement; should trigger escalation.

Patient Monitoring Leads.notes: Not clinically equivalent; included to show rejection behavior.

Foley Catheter Kit.notes: Not a kit replacement; only one sterile component.

Saline Flush.notes: Could source a flush from a kit only as last resort.
